description: Upload and add a new Image to a Project's Photo Album (Image Category).

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the segment was soft deleted

deleted.description: Indicates if the segment is deleted

self.description: A link back to the current resource

update.description: A link to the update endpoint for the resource

delete.description: A link to the delete endpoint for the resource

permanentlyDelete.description: A link to the permanent delete endpoint for the resource

retrieve.description: A link to the retrieve endpoint for the resource

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Trade

comments_count.description: the number of comments on this image

upload_uuid.description: UUID referencing a previously completed Upload. This is the recommended approach for image uploads. See Company Uploads or Project Uploads for instructions on how use uploads. You should not use bo...

image_name.description: The name of the image file to be uploaded. Required when using an upload_uuid to upload the image.

image.description: At least one attribute is required even when an 'upload_uuid' key is provided. If an 'upload_uuid' is not provided above, then the 'data' key must be provided

private.description: The Private status of the Image. Defaults to a project configuration.

provider_type.description: Provider type. Currently supports only `MarkupLayer`, and should only be used when adding an Image to markup.

provider_id.description: Provider ID. Currently supports only MarkupLayer IDs, and should only be used when adding an Image to markup.

data.description:
[DEPRECATED] File to use as image data. Please use upload_uuid instead. Note that it's only possible to post a
file using a multipart/form-data body (see RFC 2388). Most HTTP
libraries will do the ...

location_id.description: If you want to use an existing location and you have the ID of that existing location use this. `location_id` takes precedence over `mt_location`

mt_location.description: Use this for creating a new multi-tier or single-tier Location. This will be ignored if `location_id` is provided.

trade_ids.description: An array of IDs of the Trades of the Image
